info.title: Tale Public API
info.description:
Tale Platform REST API.

## Authentication

All endpoints require a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer tale_...
```

Create API keys in **Settings > API Keys**.

## Quick start — REST API

```bash
# List documents
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer tale_..." https://your-instance.com/api/v1/documents

# Create a product
curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer tale_..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name": "New Product", "price": 9.99}' \
  https://your-instance.com/api/v1/products

# List chat threads
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer tale_..." https://your-instance.com/api/v1/threads
```

## Quick start — OpenAI Compatible

```python
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://your-instance.com/api/v1",
    api_key="tale_...",
)

response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="chat-agent",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}],
)
```

## Citations

Agent mode responses include a `citations` array when knowledge tools (RAG search, web search) are used:

```python
response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="my-agent",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "What does the policy say about returns?"}],
)

# Access citations
for citation in response.model_extra.get("citations", []):
    print(f"[{citation['index']}] {citation['source']} (relevance: {citation['relevance']})")
```

For streaming, citations arrive as a separate SSE event before `[DONE]`.

post.description:
Send messages to an agent and receive a response. Fully compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completions API.

**Two modes:**
- **Agent mode** (no `tools`): The agent uses server-side tools and auto-executes them. Response includes `citations` array when knowledge tools (RAG, web search) were used.
- **Client tool mode** (`tools` provided): Only client-defined tools are used. Returns `tool_calls` for client execution.

parameters.name: X-Thread-Id
parameters.description: Reuse a conversation thread across requests.

200.description: Chat completion response (or SSE stream if stream=true)

schema.description: SSE stream of ChatCompletionChunk objects, terminated by `data: [DONE]`

403.description: Not a member of the organization

get.description: List available agents as OpenAI-compatible models. Only agents with `visibleInChat: true` are returned.

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Set to "true" to list archived threads

bearerAuth.description: API key as Bearer token (e.g., "Bearer tale_..."). Create keys in Settings > API Keys.

tools.description: Tool definitions for client-side tool calling. When provided, server-side agent tools are disabled.

citations.description: Source citations referenced in the response text via [N] markers. Empty array when no knowledge tools were used.

index.description: The [N] citation marker number in the response text

tool_call_id.description: ID of the tool call this result is for (tool messages only).

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the function parameters.
